ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lubricant_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lubricant grade */,
  "sae_viscosity_grade" TEXT /* SAE viscosity grade of the lubricant */,
  "max_temperature" INTEGER /* Maximum temperature for viscosity of 150,000 cP */,
  "viscosity_min_100c" REAL /* Minimum viscosity at 100°C */,
  "viscosity_max_100c" REAL /* Maximum viscosity at 100°C */,
  "iso_grading_equivalent" TEXT /* Approximate ISO grading equivalent */,
  "viscosity_min_40c" REAL /* Minimum viscosity at 40°C */,
  "viscosity_max_40c" REAL /* Maximum viscosity at 40°C */,
  "min_temperature" INTEGER /* Minimum temperature for the lubricant to remain effective */,
  "thermal_stability" INTEGER /* Rating of the lubricant's thermal stability (1-10) */,
  "shear_stability" INTEGER /* Rating of the lubricant's shear stability (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lubricant type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lubricant type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lubricant type */,
  "recommended_application" TEXT /* Recommended application for this type of lubricant */,
  "safety_precautions" TEXT /* Safety precautions specific to this type of lubricant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lubricant product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the lubricant product */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SAE viscosity grade */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant type */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the lubricant product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code or SKU */,
  "package_size" TEXT /* Package size (e.g., 1L, 5L) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was manufactured */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for batch tracking */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_products_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES lubricant_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_products_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES lubricant_grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, product manager, sales representative) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "recommended_lubricant_type" TEXT /* Recommended lubricant type for this application */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (e.g., temperature, humidity) under which the application operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_product_applications" (
  "product_application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-application mapping */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant product */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "recommended_product_grade" TEXT /* Recommended SAE viscosity grade for this application */,
  "recommended_product_type" TEXT /* Recommended lubricant type for this application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_applications_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES lubricant_applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_applications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant product */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_product_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "storage_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "climate_controlled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the warehouse is climate-controlled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_product_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the sale */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lubricant_product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lubricant product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES lubricant_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lubricant_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
